plugins.name: unreal-kit
plugins.description: Unreal Engine automation: Python API for asset inspection and data extraction; MCP server for live Editor authoring (actors, Blueprints, materials, PIE)

plugins.name: cache-kit
plugins.description: Cache usage reporting - per-request and session-level cache hit analysis from Claude Code transcripts

plugins.name: test-plugin
plugins.description: Test plugin exercising all 5 bootstrap steps including Claude-driven config setup

plugins.name: bootstrap
plugins.description: Centralized bootstrap engine for Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: p4-kit
plugins.description: Multi-agent local code review of Perforce changelists using Claude subagents

plugins.name: skills-kit
plugins.description: Skill authoring framework: vocabulary, type contracts, and audit tooling for designing robust, auditable Claude Code skills

plugins.name: claude-ui-kit
plugins.description: Opinionated defaults and customization skills for Claude Code's UI — currently ships the statusline (threshold colors + /statusline skill); future home for other UI surfaces

plugins.name: uninvocable-skill-example
plugins.description: Reproduction case: a plugin shipping a single skill with only Anthropic-standard frontmatter that should be /-invocable per the docs but isn't
